_comment: Connection-manifest for the Communications department. verify-wiring.sh reads this and checks each required cfg_key.

connection_points.name: ghl-api-key
connection_points.description: GoHighLevel API key for the Communications department to manage outbound messaging, email, and SMS automations.

connection_points.name: ghl-location-id
connection_points.description: GHL location ID for the Communications department's messaging sub-account.
